innovation_1.name: 基于物理先验的三层角信号分解模型 (Three-Layer Angular Signal Decomposition Physical Model)
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that disentangling angular signals using physical priors is crucial for accurately modeling and understanding complex non-Lambertian light transport.

innovation_2.name: 面向非朗伯场景的自适应几何双掩码路由架构 (Adaptive Geometric Dual-Mask Routing Architecture)
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a three-layer angular signal decomposition model that analytically isolates fundamental light components to guide the network design.
